function.message:
Processed the oldest inbox message and completed OCR-style frontmatter migration for the listed existing purchase records. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body for:
- /50_finance/purchases/2026_03_02__eur_000025__bill__school_helper_label_tape.md
- /50_finance/purchases/2026_02_06__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md
- /50_finance/purchases/2026_02_23__eur_000022__bill__toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack.md
- /50_finance/purchases/2026_01_04__eur_000080__bill__studio_parts_petg_batch.md

The fifth requested path (/50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_04__eur_000080__bill__studio_parts_petg_batch.md) does not exist (file not found), so it could not be processed.

Deleted the processed inbox file: /00_inbox/724_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, preserved note bodies while adding schema-defined frontmatter, and deleted inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from the four existing target files showed complete bill fields and line items required by finance schema; updates were applied in-place per migration workflow. The fifth requested file was attempted and returned file-not-found, so no mutation was possible for that non-existent path.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of underscored fifth file (not found)
wrote frontmatter updates to four purchase files
